message:
feat(scheduler): replace O(n) VecDeque insert with O(log n) heap

Implements bd-3q7e: PriorityScheduler now uses BinaryHeap for all three
lanes (cancel, timed, ready). Key changes:

- Replace VecDeque<SchedulerEntry> with BinaryHeap<SchedulerEntry>
- Replace VecDeque<TimedEntry> with BinaryHeap<TimedEntry>
- Add Ord/PartialOrd implementations with generation counter for FIFO
  ordering within same priority/deadline
- Update all methods to use heap operations (push/pop/drain)
- Remove O(n) insert_by_priority/insert_by_deadline helper functions

Performance: schedule() is now O(log n) instead of O(n), which matters
for high-throughput workloads with many concurrent tasks.

Note: pop_with_rng_hint() now uses deterministic FIFO ordering via
generation counter instead of RNG tie-breaking. This is acceptable
since generation provides consistent ordering for same-priority tasks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
